creator: winstonw@lavabit.com
text:
It appears Launchpad -- where Pithos's vcs is hosted -- has Debian and 
Ubuntu source packages available for download. Debian-based 
(https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Debian_build_toolchain#Source_packages) 
source packages for Pithos are available at 
https://launchpad.net/pithos/+packages (follow the "Source package" 
table-column's link labeled "pithos"; see "Download files from current 
release"). I would suggest using the Debian sid source package; we want 
the original sources which named "pithos_0.3.14.orig.tar.gz" in Debian 
sid.

With that understood, we have this URL to fetch the distfile:
https://launchpad.net/debian/sid/+source/pithos/0.3.14-1/+files/pithos_0.3.14.orig.tar.gz

I would enjoy Pithos on FreeBSD very much and I would not want this PR 
closed for the same problem discussed in the last attempt (PR 
ports/151371).
